description: The Vision is a 3D immersive environment being developed for Apple Vision Pro that allows users to experience the beginnings of Sachuest Now, by experiencing topological signal processing immersively, in a Nature environment like Sachuest Point in Middletown, Rhode Island. It will include manipulation of phase spaces, like from SSEUQFT, The Golden Core, and from all Solutions. Currently implemented as PersistenceViewer — a visionOS app that visualizes persistence diagrams, Betti curves, point clouds, manifold embeddings, and phase space trajectories from MATLAB sonar simulations using RealityKit and SwiftUI.
main_problem: How do we view and analyze topological data analysis curves and data in a calm, serene environment?

sampling_domain_justification.3D-sphere: Phase spaces of sonar data and topological signal processing outputs live on spherical manifolds; persistence diagrams from S2-sampled signals are the primary visualization target
sampling_domain_justification.3D-immersed-circle: TDA persistence features trace immersed loops in filtration space; birth-death pairs define curves immersed in the persistence plane that extend to 3D when parameterized by frequency band
sampling_domain_justification.S2: Spatial orientation on Vision Pro maps to the 2-sphere — head direction and gaze tracking produce data on S2; skybox environments are parameterized by S2
sampling_domain_justification.S3: The rotation group SO(3) ~ S3 governs 3D object manipulation in VR — rotating persistence diagrams, point clouds, and phase space trajectories in immersive space
sampling_domain_justification.Rn: PCA embeddings and point clouds in n-dimensional Euclidean space (reduced to R3 for visualization); raw data arrays from MATLAB live in Rn before dimensionality reduction

restriction_maps.description: Persistence diagrams viewed and annotated in VR space, with user attention metadata
3D Nature environments and spatial data for use in the full Sachuest Now game
Head/hand tracking behavioral data from VR sessions for behavioral biometric authentication
All VR session data for temporal sheaf audit trail

manifest.data_simulation: Generate synthetic persistence diagrams using MATLAB surf2patch with known topological genus (sphere, torus, double torus). Create simulated point clouds by sampling uniformly on known manifolds with controlled Gaussian noise. Use Enhanced_Export_Test.json (6.2MB, 80 bands) as reference for data format.

ancestry.papers_relation: Visualization frontend for SSEUQFT sonar data and all TDA results; relates to Paper 1 via phase space visualization
ancestry.immersive_topology_relation: Notebook pages about immersive environments, topology visualization, Nature, and spatial computing inform the design of the VR experience

sampling_domain.description: The Vision operates at the intersection of multiple sampling domains. The primary data being visualized (persistence diagrams, point clouds, PCA embeddings) comes from signals sampled on spheres and immersed circles via SSEUQFT. The VR interaction itself generates data on S2 (gaze direction) and S3 (rotation group for 3D manipulation). The rendering space is R3 embedded in the broader Rn of the original data.

data_in: PCA data (JSON point clouds from Golden Core)
Point clouds (3D coordinates with topological metadata)
Persistence diagrams from SSEUQFT (JSON format via export_to_visionpro.py)
Experiment data from Mobius Band project (JSON with configurations, bands, statistics)
input_specification.live_data: Head tracking (gaze direction on S2), hand gesture positions (3D coordinates), spatial interaction events, annotation inputs
input_specification.archive_data: Experiment JSON files with persistence diagrams, Betti curves, point clouds, manifold embeddings per frequency band. Currently synced from Mobius Band project.
input_specification.simulated_data: SIMULATED: Generate synthetic persistence diagrams using MATLAB surf2patch with known genus; sample point clouds on known manifolds (sphere, torus, Klein bottle approximation) with controlled noise sigma=0.01-0.1; format matching Enhanced_Export_Test.json schema

transformation_core.description: Transforms pre-computed topological data analysis results into immersive 3D visualizations on Apple Vision Pro. Renders persistence diagrams as 2D scatter plots in spatial windows, point clouds as RealityKit ModelEntity meshes, Betti curves as interactive line charts, manifold embeddings (Isomap, LLE, Diffusion Map) as rotatable 3D spaces, and phase space trajectories as animated paths. The Coastal Design System provides nature-themed UI consistent with the Sachuest Point environment.
visualization_views: ExperimentListView: Main navigation showing experiment metadata, drill-down to configurations
PersistenceDiagramView: 2D scatter of birth-death pairs colored by homology dimension (H0=blue, H1=green, H2=red)
PointCloud3DView: RealityKit 3D point cloud with rotation/zoom gestures, LOD rendering
BettiCurvesView: Line charts showing Betti numbers across filtration parameter (100 bins x 3 dimensions)
ManifoldEmbeddingView: Tabs for Isomap, LLE, Diffusion Map — 3D point cloud embeddings
PhaseSpaceTrajectoryView: Animated 3D trajectory through phase space (2000 points)
FrequencyBandGridView: Grid navigator for 20 frequency bands per configuration
PersistenceLandscapeView: Persistence landscape visualization (5 layers x 100 bins)
transformation_core.design_system: CoastalDesignSystem.swift — ocean blues, sandy beiges, sunset oranges; SF Pro typography; high contrast for VR readability

data_out: Immersive 3D visualizations rendered on Vision Pro
Spatial interaction trajectories (gaze, hand, head tracking)
Annotated persistence diagrams (user-added notes on topological features)
Session metrics (duration, visualizations used, bands explored)
Screenshots and recordings of immersive sessions

sends_to.description: Persistence diagrams with user attention metadata — which features were examined, how long, spatial annotations
3D Nature environments (Sachuest Point models, skyboxes) usable in the full VR game
Head/hand tracking behavioral data from VR sessions — gaze patterns on S2, gesture timing, navigation sequences for behavioral biometric authentication
Complete VR session data for temporal sheaf audit trail

receives_from.description: Persistence diagrams, Betti curves, point clouds from sonar signal processing via export_to_visionpro.py
PCA results and dimensionality reduction data for 3D visualization
GoldenTheme Swift package providing consistent UI design across all Solution frontends

Data models (PersistenceModels.swift) — full hierarchy for experiments, configurations, bands, features
8 visualization views (persistence diagrams, point clouds, Betti curves, manifold embeddings, phase space, frequency band grid, persistence landscape)
Coastal Design System (ocean blues, sandy beiges, high-contrast VR theme)
RealityKit integration for 3D point cloud rendering
Data sync pipeline from Mobius Band project (sync_to_visionpro.sh, export_to_visionpro.py)
2 large JSON test datasets (Enhanced_Export_Test.json at 6.2MB, experiment_2025-10-06_220239.json at 6.6MB)
5 documentation files (GUI_ARCHITECTURE.md, IMPLEMENTATION_STATUS.md, SYNC_WORKFLOW.md, QUICKSTART.md, QUICK_REFERENCE.md)

build_status_detail.simulation_approach: Generate synthetic persistence diagrams using MATLAB surf2patch with known topological genus. Create simulated point clouds by sampling on known manifolds (sphere, torus, double torus, Klein bottle approximation) with controlled Gaussian noise. Use Enhanced_Export_Test.json as format reference. For VR interaction data, generate synthetic gaze trajectories on S2 using random walks on the sphere.

from_brian.description: Implement hand gesture interaction for manipulating persistence diagrams in 3D space — pinch to select features, drag to rotate, spread to zoom
Add phase space manipulation from SSEUQFT data — interactive rotate, zoom, slice through phase spaces with real-time cross-section display
Create spatial audio integration — map topological features to sound using Shepard tones (Data Y Sheaf). Higher Betti numbers = higher pitch, persistent features = sustained tones
Build restriction map exporters — capture VR interaction data (gaze S2 trajectory, hand gestures, navigation patterns) and export to Golden Cipher and The Witness
Integrate with Sachuest Now as the beginning experience — The Vision is the serene entry point before the full game. Provide a calm, meditative VR data exploration space

simulation: For initial app development, use simulated data where necessary. Enhanced_Export_Test.json (6.2MB, 80 bands) and experiment_2025-10-06_220239.json (6.6MB) provide real test data. For new features, generate synthetic persistence diagrams with known topological properties.
pre_processing: Data is pre-processed in the Mobius Band MATLAB project: MATLAB simulations generate sonar data, fixedComputePerBandTDA.py computes TDA, export_to_visionpro.py converts to Vision-compatible JSON format, sync_to_visionpro.sh copies to The Vision's Data/ directory.
golden_lake_relation: Future: VR session interaction data (gaze trajectories, gesture patterns, feature attention) will be stored in Golden Lake for longitudinal analysis
golden_core_relation: Consumes PCA embeddings and TDA results from Golden Core services. Uses TDA-relay for topological computations on new data sources.

golden_toml_entry.session_data_schema: session_id, experiment_loaded, bands_viewed, visualizations_used, interaction_events, gaze_trajectory, hand_gestures, total_duration_ms, annotations_made

data_simulation_protocol.description: Generate synthetic topological data for pipeline testing when real experiment data from Mobius Band is unavailable
steps: 1. Generate synthetic manifolds in MATLAB: sphere via surf2patch(sphere(50)), torus via parameterized (R+r*cos(v))*cos(u), double torus via connected sum
2. Sample N=100-1000 points uniformly on each manifold surface with additive Gaussian noise (sigma=0.01 to 0.1)
3. Compute persistence diagrams using Ripser or MATLAB TDA toolbox — verify known Betti numbers (sphere: b0=1, b2=1; torus: b0=1, b1=2, b2=1)
4. Format as PersistenceExperiment JSON matching Enhanced_Export_Test.json schema: configurations → bands → persistenceDiagram, statistics, bettiCurves, pointCloud
5. Generate 4 configurations with 20 bands each (80 bands total, matching real data structure)
6. For VR interaction simulation: generate random walks on S2 (gaze trajectory) using von Mises-Fisher distribution, and random hand gesture events
8. Save session simulation JSONLs to assets/processed/vision_sessions/

immersive_topology_query.description: Query processed Immersive Topology notebook pages by Types_Subjects relevant to The Vision
immersive_topology_query.query_method: Use /type-search or /notebook-browse Claude Code commands, or rag.ask() for codebase queries
immersive_topology_query.integration_point: Results saved to assets/raw/immersive_topology_references.jsonl for incorporation into VR content design and mathematical context
example_queries: /type-search Spacetime Manifold -- find pages about spacetime manifold structures for VR display
/type-search Nature Ocean Spatial -- find pages about Nature environments and spatial experiences
/type-search Topology Signal Acoustics -- find pages about topological signal processing relevant to sonar visualization
/notebook-browse --types Meditation,Nature -- find contemplative pages informing the calm VR environment
/archive-search 'persistence diagram visualization' -- find historical precursors of the Vision approach

consistency_matrix.description: Hooks for the topological compiler consistency check. The compiler iterates through all files in SolutionConfigurations/ and validates format compatibility and cocycle conditions.

data_phi_sheaf.output_schema: persistence diagrams with user attention metadata (feature_id, view_duration_ms, annotation_text, spatial_position)
data_phi_sheaf.validates_against: E Sheaf and C Sheaf input schemas

sachuest_now.output_schema: 3D model files with metadata JSON (location, capture_date, scale, coordinate_system)

the_golden_cipher.output_schema: behavioral trajectory with gaze_s2, hand_positions, gesture_types, timing per session_data_schema
the_golden_cipher.validates_against: Golden Cipher behavioral trajectory input schema

sseuqft.input_schema: PersistenceExperiment JSON with configurations, bands, persistence features, Betti curves, point clouds

the_golden_core.input_schema: point cloud arrays with dimensionality metadata and explained variance ratios

the_theme.input_schema: GoldenTheme Swift package with color, typography, and component definitions

network_algorithm_sub.input_schema: frame metadata with mathematical transform parameters and output image paths

cocycle_conditions.chain: SSEUQFT -> The Vision -> Data Phi Sheaf
cocycle_conditions.condition: Sonar TDA results imported from SSEUQFT, when viewed and annotated in VR, must produce valid E Sheaf data with preserved topological invariants (Betti numbers unchanged by visualization transform)

cocycle_conditions.chain: The Vision -> The Golden Cipher -> The Witness
cocycle_conditions.condition: Spatial interaction trajectories exported to Golden Cipher for authentication, when logged by The Witness, must preserve behavioral signature topology (PH of trajectory invariant under session segmentation)

cocycle_conditions.chain: The Vision -> Sachuest Now -> The Vision
cocycle_conditions.condition: Environment models exported to Sachuest Now, when used in the full game and re-imported as game environments, must maintain geometric fidelity (mesh topology preserved)
